message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2cw.5","title":"Build small-state exhaustive scheduler checker and cycle-budget checkpoint validation","description":"Background:
Random tests miss starvation and fairness corner cases; small-state exhaustive analysis is required.

Subtasks:
- Build bounded state-space explorer for scheduler transitions.
- Validate fairness/starvation properties against expected invariants.
- Validate cycle-budget checkpoint behavior under low-frequency CPU assumptions.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Checker catches seeded adversarial ordering bugs.
- Output includes minimized counterexample traces for failures.
- Results are reproducible and CI-friendly.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:49:31.594112372Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:15:47.486871649Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T19:15:47.486853946Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["model-check","phase-5","runtime"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2cw.6","title":"Implement bounded MPSC two-phase channel (reserve/send/abort) with FIFO and wakeup correctness","description":"Background:
Two-phase channel semantics are key to obligation linearity and correctness under backpressure.

Subtasks:
- Implement reserve/send/abort transitions and legality checks.
- Enforce bounded capacity behavior and deterministic rejection/backpressure semantics.
- Validate FIFO and wakeup behavior under concurrent producer patterns.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Channel conformance fixtures pass for success/failure paths.
- No illegal state transitions survive API boundaries.
- Detailed logs exist for deadlock/starvation debugging in tests.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:49:31.682771083Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T06:32:24.940655755Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T06:32:24.940631881Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["channel","phase-6","runtime"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.6","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2cw.7","title":"Implement optional parallel profile with worker model, lane rules, and fairness validation","description":"Background:
Phase 8 is optional but must be planned with strict parity constraints relative to deterministic single-thread mode.

Subtasks:
- Implement worker model and lane scheduling rules for ready/cancel/timed work.
- Implement bounded fairness controls and test harnesses.
- Validate no semantic regression in deterministic single-thread profile.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Parallel profile is feature-flagged and isolated from core mode.
- Fairness tests pass for enabled paths.
- Deterministic profile behavior remains unchanged.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:53:10.225734749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T23:10:53.030853715Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T23:10:53.030835210Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parallel","phase-8","runtime"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.7","depends_on_id":"bd-296.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.7","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2cw.7","depends_on_id":"bd-j4m.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-2hs1","title":"Add Guarantee Impact proof block for checkpoint waiver commit","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"docs","created_at":"2026-04-01T17:43:48.485574050Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-01T17:43:52.983630163Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-2n0","title":"EPIC: Dual Codec (JSON/BIN), Trace, Replay, and Continuity","description":"Background:
JSON-first comparison and optimized binary transport must coexist without semantic divergence.

Goal:
Deliver codec abstraction, trace/replay pipeline, and crash/restart continuity with canonical semantic digests.

Guarantee:
Codec choice may affect throughput/footprint only; it may not alter semantic outcomes.

Why this serves users:
- JSON enables inspectability and easier parity debugging
- binary enables production efficiency
- replay continuity supports post-failure forensics.

Cross-cutting quality contract:
- Child tasks must define and link unit tests, e2e script coverage (when behavioral), and structured log/manifest artifacts or explicit rationale for non-applicability.
- Completion evidence must remain compatible with bd-66l.9 enforcement and traceability index expectations.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:47:42.176136721Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T19:36:07.579467843Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T19:36:07.579450220Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["codec","phase-7","replay"]}
 {"id":"bd-2n0.1","title":"Implement codec abstraction and canonical schema model with JSON baseline","description":"Background:
JSON-first is required for transparent parity bring-up and debugging. It establishes semantic baseline before binary optimization.

Subtasks:
- Implement codec abstraction interface and canonical message schema model.
- Implement JSON encode/decode path for fixtures and trace tooling.
- Validate deterministic serialization of semantic fields and stable error surfaces.

Acceptance Criteria:
- JSON codec passes schema validation and fixture replay tests.
- No semantic fields are codec-specific.
- Decoder failure behavior is deterministic and documented.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:49:50.703808433Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T05:41:03.760875560Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T05:41:03.760857196Z","close_reason":"Implemented codec abstraction + canonical fixture schema model with JSON encode/decode baseline; deterministic replay key and unit/conformance tests validated via rch make build/test.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["codec","json","phase-7"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2n0.1","depends_on_id":"bd-296.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2n0.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2n0","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2n0.1","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2n0.2","title":"Implement optimized binary codec (length-delimited, compact fields, checksum, safe zero-copy paths)","description":"Background:
Binary mode is needed for throughput/latency/footprint gains while preserving exact semantics.

Subtasks:
- Implement frame format with message type and schema versioning.
- Implement compact field encoding and optional integrity footer/checksum.
- Implement safe zero-copy decode for hot payloads where invariants permit.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Binary codec round-trips all canonical schema fields.
- Version mismatch and corruption paths are deterministic and test-covered.
- Performance intent is measurable with benchmark fixtures.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:49:50.792325589Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T06:13:54.466178218Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T06:13:54.466160364Z","close_reason":"Completed: binary frame codec with schema/version/checksum, zero-copy decode view, and deterministic corruption/version/truncation coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["binary","codec","performance","phase-7"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2n0.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2n0","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2n0.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2n0.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T04:37:11Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
